name: Artificial Algae Algorithm
summary: A bio-inspired, population-based metaheuristic optimization algorithm that models adaptive algal colonies to search complex solution spaces.
motivation: AAA provides a flexible search framework for problems where gradients are unavailable, objective landscapes are multimodal, or practical constraints make conventional optimization difficult.
mechanism: Each candidate solution is represented as an algal colony. Fitness-based adaptation and colony movement produce a balance between broad exploration and focused exploitation of promising regions.
